---
title: "baranickkyra.github.io"
title: Kyra Baranick
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
links:
    - icon: LinkedIn
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kyra-baranick-a15028309/
      text: Email
      href: mailto:baranickkyra@gmail.com
---
